system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling.Your task is to generate a complete and functional file named: <file_name>alphat</file_name> within the <folder_name>0</folder_name> directory. Ensure all required values are present and match with the files content already generated.Before finalizing the output, ensure:
- All necessary fields exist (e.g., if `nu` is defined in `constant/transportProperties`, it must be used correctly in `0/U`).
- Cross-check field names between different files to avoid mismatches.
- Ensure units and dimensions are correct** for all physical variables.
- Ensure case solver settings are consistent with the user's requirements. Available solvers are: ['compressibleInterFoam', 'cavitatingFoam', 'SRFSimpleFoam', 'solidEquilibriumDisplacementFoam', 'pimpleFoam', 'compressibleMultiphaseInterFoam', 'PDRFoam', 'reactingFoam', 'dsmcFoam', 'XiFoam', 'potentialFreeSurfaceFoam', 'foamyQuadMesh', 'chemFoam', 'electrostaticFoam', 'foamyHexMesh', 'simpleFoam', 'mdFoam', 'interFoam', 'potentialFoam', 'financialFoam', 'rhoPorousSimpleFoam', 'buoyantReactingFoam', 'rhoSimpleFoam', 'multiphaseEulerFoam', 'laplacianFoam', 'interMixingFoam', 'twoLiquidMixingFoam', 'boundaryFoam', 'pisoFoam', 'particleFoam', 'blockMesh', 'chtMultiRegionFoam', 'buoyantFoam', 'icoFoam', 'rhoPimpleFoam', 'mdEquilibrationFoam', 'rhoCentralFoam', 'porousSimpleFoam', 'solidDisplacementFoam', 'scalarTransportFoam', 'dnsFoam', 'refineMesh', 'SRFPimpleFoam', 'shallowWaterFoam', 'driftFluxFoam', 'adjointShapeOptimisationFoam', 'multiphaseInterFoam', 'mhdFoam', 'denseParticleFoam', 'moveDynamicMesh', 'snappyHexMesh'].
Provide only the code—no explanations, comments, or additional text.
user_prompt:
User requirement: do a counterflow flame simulation using OpenFOAM reactingFoam solver, employing a compressible flow solver for detailed combustion modeling. Define the computational domain as a 2D rectangular region with a width of 0.02 meters and a height of 0.02 meters. Use CH4, O2 and N2 as species. Include chemical kinetics using the reaction mechanism. velocity of fuel is 0.2 m/s and velocity of air is -0.1 m/s. Set the simulation runtime from 0 to 0.5 seconds with a write interval of 0.05 seconds and deltaT of 1e-6.
Refer to the following similar case file content if helpful:
<similar_case_reference><index>
case name: counterFlowFlame2D
case domain: combustion
case category: laminar
case solver: reactingFoam
</index>
<directory_structure>
<dir>directory name: 0. File names in this directory: [CH4, CO2, H2O, N2, O2, T, U, Ydefault, alphat, p]</dir>
<dir>directory name: system. File names in this directory: [blockMeshDict, controlDict, fvSchemes, fvSolution]</dir>
<dir>directory name: constant. File names in this directory: [chemistryProperties, combustionProperties, momentumTransport, physicalProperties, reactions, thermo.compressibleGas]</dir>
</directory_structure></similar_case_reference>
match_level='high' use_scope='All files from the reference case counterFlowFlame2D can be used as templates, including blockMeshDict (adjust domain to 0.02m × 0.02m), boundary conditions in 0/ directory (set fuel inlet velocity to 0.2 m/s and air inlet velocity to -0.1 m/s), thermophysicalProperties and chemistryProperties (ensure CH4/O2/N2 species and appropriate reaction mechanism), and controlDict (set endTime=0.5, deltaT=1e-6, writeInterval=0.05).' advice="Use the counterFlowFlame2D tutorial case as a direct template and modify the domain dimensions to 0.02×0.02 m, fuel/air inlet velocities to 0.2/-0.1 m/s, species list to CH4/O2/N2, and time-control parameters (deltaT=1e-6, endTime=0.5, writeInterval=0.05) to match the user's specifications."If the similar case is a weak match, do not copy it blindly. Use it only where it is consistent with the user requirement. Just modify the necessary parts to make the file complete and functional.Please ensure that the generated file is complete, functional, and logically sound.Additionally, apply your domain expertise to verify that all numerical values are consistent with the user's requirements, maintaining accuracy and coherence.When generating controlDict, do not include anything to preform post processing. Just include the necessary settings to run the simulation.
